headline: Is Progressive (PGR) One of the Most Undervalued NYSE Stocks to Invest In?
summary: The Progressive Corporation (NYSE:PGR) is one of the most undervalued NYSE stocks to invest in. On June 17, the Progressive Corporation reported strong financial results for May, with net income rising to $1.445 billion, a 36% increase compared to the same period last year. Net premiums written grew 6% to $7.027 billion, while net premiums […]
